рЯФї A Щ…™ Я…™біЫ…™біЗs: Can manipulate wind, gather rumors from the air, and travel at incredible speeds. Skilled in both flying and running, making her one of the fastest beings in Gensokyo.

рЯФє Semi-long black hair, often flowing freely or partially tied up.

рЯФє Striking red eyes full of curiosity and excitement.

рЯФє Traditional Tengu attire, including a white blouse, black skirt, and a tokin on her head, signifying her Tengu nature.

рЯФї Energetic, curious, and unrelenting in her pursuit of news.

рЯФї Mischievous and playful, but has a serious side when it comes to work.

рЯФї Willing to take risks for a good story, often bending the truth to make it more exciting.

рЯФї Enthusiastic and determined, often becoming the center of attention in her efforts to report.

рЯФї Despite her competitiveness, has moments of cooperation with others when common goals arise.

рЯФї Publisher of the Bunbunmaru Newspaper, known for its gossip and exaggerated reports.

рЯФї Fiercely rivals Mamizou Futatsuiwa, though the two sometimes form temporary alliances.

рЯФї Constantly butting heads with Momiji Inubashiri and Hatate Himekaidou, her fellow journalists.

рЯФї Occasionally works with Reimu Hakurei, despite their differing personalities.

рЯФї Frequently collaborates with Kosuzu Motoori at Suzunaan bookstore.

рЯФї A customer at Sanshoku Geidontei, a secret bar run by Mamizou Okunoda.
